CVE-2019-13568.title: CImg through 2.6.7 has a heap-based buffer overflow in _load_bmp  ...
CVE-2019-13568.summary: CImg through 2.6.7 has a heap-based buffer overflow in _load_bmp in CImg.h because of erroneous memory allocation for a malformed BMP image.

CVE-2020-25693.title: A flaw was found in CImg in versions prior to 2.9.3. Integer over ...
CVE-2020-25693.summary: A flaw was found in CImg in versions prior to 2.9.3. Integer overflows leading to heap buffer overflows in load_pnm() can be triggered by a specially crafted input file processed by CImg, which can lead to an impact to application availability or data integrity.

CVE-2022-1325.title: A flaw was found in Clmg, where with the help of a maliciously cr ...
CVE-2022-1325.summary: A flaw was found in Clmg, where with the help of a maliciously crafted pandore or bmp file with modified dx and dy header field values it is possible to trick the application into allocating huge buffer sizes like 64 Gigabyte upon reading the file from disk or from a virtual buffer.

CVE-2024-26540.title: A heap-based buffer overflow in Clmg before 3.3.3 can occur via a ...
CVE-2024-26540.summary: A heap-based buffer overflow in Clmg before 3.3.3 can occur via a crafted file to cimg_library::CImg<unsigned char>::_load_analyze.
